name: Aalekh
shortDescription: Introduces students to the world's finer arts and raises awareness of creative expression through diverse cultural activities.
description:
AALEKH- Art Elated Club's goal is to introduce students to the world's finer arts and raise their awareness of them. An important aspect of the club's mission is to help its members develop their creative and critical thinking abilities in a safe environment.

The club hosts a variety of entertaining activities that not only amuse us but also help us gain a better knowledge of the diverse cultures and customs that exist around the world.
achievements: Ajeya Bhattacharya received 2nd prize in Colour Splash — Monochromatic Painting
Won 1st Prize in Crane-o-Mania event at TechFest IIT Bombay
Won 1st prize in Impressions 2k18 at COEP
Won 1st prize in Paper Décor Competition Melange 2k19 at VIT, Pune
Won 2nd Prize in MECHTRIX competition MindSpark 2k19 at COEP
eventsParticipated: Inter college Event Impressions 2k19 at COEP
eventsOrganized: ARTISIA 2k20 virtually on various social media platforms
म मराठीचा competition to celebrate Marathi Bhasha week
salientFeatures: Organizes Inter college event ARTISIA to celebrate WORLD ART DAY
Decorates the entire college campus during annual gathering NAKSHTRA
Organizes exhibitions showcasing sketches, paintings, sculptures & crafts

name: Aero
shortDescription: MITAOE's first aeromodelling club, building and flying model aircraft while learning aerodynamics and engineering design.
description: MITAOE Aero is MITAOE's first ever Aeromodelling club established in 2018 by Faculty Coordinator Prof. Savita Pawar, SEE and Student Coordinators. The club focuses on designing, building, and flying model aircraft while educating members about aerodynamics, propulsion, and control systems.
achievements: Successfully designed and flew multiple model aircraft
Participated in national-level aeromodelling competitions
salientFeatures: Hands-on experience in aircraft design and construction
Training in aerodynamics and flight principles

name: Autosports
shortDescription: Designs, manufactures and tests ATVs to participate in various national level competitions, embodying engineering excellence.
description: Team Niyudrath Racing, a club under the Autosports club, aims at designing, manufacturing and testing an ATV to participate in various national level competitions. The club provides students hands-on experience in automotive engineering, from concept design to manufacturing.
achievements: Successfully built and raced ATVs in national competitions
Multiple podium finishes in BAJA SAE events

name: CodeChef MITAOE Chapter
shortDescription: Programming club run by official MITAOE Chapter representatives, mentored by CodeChef to promote competitive programming.
description: CodeChef MITAOE Chapter are the programming clubs that are run and maintained by the official MITAOE Chapter representatives and are mentored by CodeChef. MITAOE Chapter aims at promoting competitive programming in various colleges and schools around the world and helps students become better problem solvers.
achievements: Aaditya Barve qualified for ICPC Regionals, ranked under top 130
Aaditya Barve secured rank under top 100 in Google Kickstart
Received highest placement package from college of 25 LPA
Won Smart India Hackathon 2022 at IIT Dhanbad
Chetan Patil achieved 5★ rating on Codechef — India top 1000
Global Rank 24 in CodeChef Starters 100 Division 2
Neeraj Kumar cracked International Internship at NodeShark Hexfork Ltd, UK
Vaishnavi Jadhav secured SDE Internship at Amazon
Yashodhan Ghule won first prize awarded by Vice President of India
salientFeatures: Promoting competitive programming and enhancing coding culture
Helping kids learn programming through school outreach

name: Developer Student Club
shortDescription: A Google Developers program for university students to learn mobile and web development skills, design thinking, and leadership.
description: Developer Student Clubs is a Google Developers program for university students to learn mobile and web development skills, design thinking and leadership skills. The club provides a peer-to-peer learning environment for students interested in Google developer technologies.
achievements: Multiple Google Solution Challenge participations
Students placed at top tech companies
salientFeatures: Focus on mobile and web development

name: Digital Design Club
shortDescription: Empowers students with digital design skills including graphic design, UI/UX, and multimedia content creation.
description: The Digital Design Club is formed keeping in mind the growing importance of digital media and design in today's world. The club focuses on teaching students graphic design, UI/UX design, video editing, and other digital creation skills.
achievements: Designed official posters and branding for college events
Students won design competitions at inter-college level

name: Drama Club
shortDescription: Ignites acting skills and promotes script writing, stage management, drama, skits, plays, and street plays.
description:
DRAMA Club aims to ignite the skill of acting, skill to represent themselves in various situations in real life as well. The club also promotes students in writing scripts and management of various events like drama, skits, plays, street plays etc. Through the club, students represent the institute at various state level and national level drama and acting competitions.

Different events in the institute under the banner of Art Circle, various cultural events and other occasions prove a real entertainment and enjoyment to everyone. The students with proper professional training learn skills that help them grow throughout their life.
achievements: Won Prize in ON Sport Prop Making at Firodiya 2023
Shortlisted in first 20 rank at Firodiya Karandak
Award for Best Papercut Stop Motion Animation in Firodiya Karandak 2020 for play 'Sidestand'
Nomination for Best Actor to Mr. Kiran Pawar in Firodiya Karandak 2020
Best Stop Motion Animation award in Firodiya Karandak 2019 for play 'Manzar'
Appreciated as new concept of Stop Motion Animation in history of Firodiya Karandak 2019
Best Actor & Best Team Management award at Osmanabad drama competition 2018
Award for Best Culture and Best Actor for play 'WhyNot' at Firodiya Karandak 2017
Best Actor & Actress award in Firodiya Karandak 2016 for play 'Baari'
eventsParticipated: State level Drama Competition at Osmanabad 2018
eventsOrganized: Workshop for Drama club students for acting skillsets and theater essentials (Oct 2019)
Drama show for college students and faculties (Feb 2019)
salientFeatures: Five key pillars: Acting, Art, Music, Dance, and Management
Society's current situations and problems-based presentation during Firodiya Karandak
Consistent award-winning performance in various competitions

name: Foreign Language Club
shortDescription: Creates awareness about foreign languages to help students in their professional careers and global interactions.
description: The Foreign Language Club aims to create awareness among the students about foreign languages which will help them in their professional career and global interactions. The club conducts sessions in Japanese, German, French, and other international languages.
achievements: Students cleared international language certification exams
Cultural exchange events with international students

name: GirlScript
shortDescription: A technical community, section-8 company registered under Government of India, present in 36 cities and 3 international chapters.
description: GirlScript is a technical community, section-8 company registered under Government of India in 36 cities of India and 3 international chapters. The MITAOE chapter focuses on promoting technical education and encouraging participation from all students regardless of gender.
achievements: Successfully organized Code Velocity Challenge
Active participation in GirlScript Summer of Code

name: Goonj
shortDescription: A place where students jam, learn, and create music from a variety of genres with wide-ranging event participation.
description: GOONJ is a place where students may jam, learn, and create music from a variety of genres. Club members participate in a wide range of events including live performances, music competitions, and cultural festivals. The club nurtures musical talent and provides a creative outlet for students.
achievements: Won music competitions at inter-college festivals
Regular performances at college annual gatherings

name: Ignited Minds
shortDescription: Established to serve the nation through social activity, fostering social responsibility among engineering students.
description: Ignited Minds student club was established by the students of MITAoE during the year 2013. The main objective of this club is to serve the nation through social activity. The club organizes various outreach programs, community service events, and awareness campaigns.
achievements: Successfully conducted multiple social outreach programs
Blood donation drives with significant participation
Environmental awareness campaigns
salientFeatures: Focus on social service and community development

name: Menace Dance Club
shortDescription: One of the most active clubs, established to promote dance culture and provide a platform for creative expression through movement.
description: Menace Dance Club was formed in the year 2017. It is one of the most active and hardworking clubs of our college. It was established in order to promote dance culture and provide students a platform for creative expression through various dance forms.
achievements: Won prizes at inter-college dance competitions
Performed at college annual gathering NAKSHTRA

name: Mozilla Club
shortDescription: Conducts enjoyable events that entertain and enrich understanding of open-source technologies and web development.
description: Various enjoyable events are conducted under the club which not only entertains but also enriches our understanding of various open-source technologies and web development concepts. The Mozilla Club promotes open-source culture and web literacy among students.
achievements: Active contribution to Mozilla open-source projects
Students recognized as Mozilla community leaders

name: Prakruti
shortDescription: Provides members opportunities to keep physically fit and mentally alert through nature activities and adventure sports.
description: The club aims at providing the members with opportunity to keep physically fit and mentally alert, allowing members to determine their own level of involvement in nature and adventure activities. Prakruti organizes treks, nature walks, and environmental awareness programs.
achievements: Successfully organized multiple trekking expeditions
Environmental awareness campaigns reaching hundreds of students

name: Robotics Club
shortDescription: Provides opportunities to benchmark robotics skills, train students for national and international competitions like Robocon.
description:
The primary aim of the Robotics Club is to provide an opportunity to benchmark skills, create robotic engineers on campus and support them for training, providing resources from concept to execution. One of the objectives is to train students to participate in various robotic competitions at national and international levels.

MIT AOE Robotics Club conducts workshops, seminars for beginners, provides training, industrial tours, and encourages participation in competitions like Techfest, Technovanza, MindSpark, E-Yantra, WSI, and Robocon.
achievements: AIR-10 in Robocon 2022
Won 1st Rank at WS Asia 2018, Abu Dhabi — Rohan Hanagi & OM Gourav
Won Medallion of Excellence at WSI 2019 Kazan Russia
National winner in Mobile Robotics at India Skill 2018 — ₹1,00,000 prize
Winner in Robo Race at Technovanza 2K19 VJTI Mumbai — ₹10,000 prize
Cleared 1st Round of Robocon 2020
Regional winner at Mobile Robotics East Zone Bhubaneshwar
eventsParticipated: India Skill 2018 National Competition, New Delhi
eventsOrganized: Robo Race and Robo Maze at Club Mela during NAKSHTRA
salientFeatures: Robo Race and Robo Maze events at annual gathering

name: Rotaract Club
shortDescription: Part of Rotary International, promoting health, peace, and prosperity through community service and leadership development.
description: Paul Harris, founder of Rotary Club, founded it in Chicago (United States) on Feb. 23, 1905. Rotary promotes health, peace and prosperity through community service. The Rotaract Club of MITAOE carries forward this legacy through various social service activities.
achievements: Recognized by Rotary International for outstanding community service
Successfully organized multiple blood donation drives
salientFeatures: Focus on health, peace, and prosperity

name: Spark
shortDescription: Provides a platform for techies to work on different projects, creating technical awareness among students.
description: This club provides a platform for all techies to work on different projects. This will create a technical awareness among students and help them gain practical knowledge beyond classroom learning.
achievements: Multiple project showcases at college festivals
Students secured internships through club projects

name: Sports Club
shortDescription: MIT Master Blaster promotes sportsmanship and provides opportunities for students to excel in various sporting activities.
description: "Do you know what my favorite part of the game is? The opportunity to play." — Mike Singletary. The sports club's name is MIT MASTER BLASTER, and it provides students with opportunities to participate in various sports at college, inter-college, and university levels.
achievements: Multiple wins at university-level sports competitions
Students represented university at national level

name: Srujan Club
shortDescription: A group of talented and enthusiastic students striving to promote innovation, creativity and technical excellence.
description: The SRUJAN Club has been established at MIT AOE in the year 2019-2020. With a group of talented and enthusiastic students, the SRUJAN Club strives to promote innovation, creativity and technical excellence among the student community.
achievements: Innovative project showcases
Student-led innovation workshops

name: Spiritual Minds
shortDescription: Focuses on physical and mental well-being through yoga, Pranayama, spiritual discussions, and mindfulness activities.
description: The 'Spiritual Minds Club' focuses on physical and mental well-being through activities like yoga, Pranayama, spiritual discussions, and mindfulness practices. The club aims to create a balanced and stress-free environment for students.
achievements: Organized successful yoga and meditation sessions
Helped students manage academic stress
salientFeatures: Focus on physical and mental well-being

name: Shutterbugs
shortDescription: Passionate about photography and visual storytelling, exploring the art of capturing moments through the lens.
description: Are you passionate about photography and eager to explore the fascinating world of visual storytelling? Look no further! The Shutterbugs Club provides a platform for photography enthusiasts to learn, practice, and showcase their work.
achievements: Won prizes at inter-college photography competitions
Official photography team for college events

name: The Axes
shortDescription: Encourages and unleashes talent and skills in logical development, mathematical thinking, and problem-solving.
description: THE AXES, Maths Club of MITAoE, aims to encourage and unleash the talent and skills of the students in the field of logical development, mathematical thinking, and creative problem-solving through engaging activities and competitions.
achievements: Students excelled in mathematical olympiads
Regular quiz competition winners

name: Yoga & Meditation
shortDescription: Transforms students into responsible, healthy, sharp, and spiritually elevated citizens through yoga and meditation.
description: Our goal is to transform students into responsible citizens of the World, who are healthy, sharp and spiritually elevated through regular yoga and meditation practices. The club promotes holistic well-being and balanced living.
achievements: Organized International Yoga Day celebrations
Regular meditation sessions benefiting hundreds of students

name: Vertex
shortDescription: Bridges mathematics, programming, and creativity through game development and animation projects.
description: Vertex Game Development and Animation club bridges Mathematics, Programming, and Creativity. The club focuses on teaching game development fundamentals, 3D animation, and interactive media creation.
achievements: Student-developed games showcased at college events
